name: ExtensionMeasureReport_Group_Stratifier_Stratum_Population_SubjectReport
title: R5: For subject-list reports, a subject result in this population (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.population.subjectReport` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.population.subjectReport` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MeasureReport)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.population.subjectReport` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MeasureReport)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.population.subjectReport` has a context of MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.population based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MeasureReport`.
Element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.population.subjectReport` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: For subject-list reports, a subject result in this population (new)
element.comment:
Element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.population.subjectReport` has a context of MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.population based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MeasureReport`.
Element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.population.subjectReport` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This element SHALL NOT be used in with subjectResults, either systems provide results as a List of MeasureReport, or as references to individual MeasureReports. Note that using this element introduces a constraint on the size of the subject-list MeasureReport; implementations would be free to return a TOO-COSTLY response if a request is made for a subject-list report with too many subjects.

element.short: For subject-list reports, a subject result in this population
element.definition: A reference to an individual level MeasureReport resource for a member of the population.
element.comment: This element SHALL NOT be used in with subjectResults, either systems provide results as a List of MeasureReport, or as references to individual MeasureReports. Note that using this element introduces a constraint on the size of the subject-list MeasureReport; implementations would be free to return a TOO-COSTLY response if a request is made for a subject-list report with too many subjects.
